conditions.title: DPA Closing:  FL HTH 2nd lien
conditions.description: on Hometown Heroes Standard or Bond loan 2nd lien term 5% of total loan amount, (minimum $10,000 capped at $35,000), Lien amt of $              ,0% interest, non-amortizing,30-yr deferred payment to be paid back at time of sale, refi, transfer of property or loan is paid off.

conditions.title: DPA Closing:  Florida Housing Docs

conditions.title: DPA Closing:  Home Plus 2nd Lien

conditions.description: Closer to pull the Mortgagor Certificate, Obligation letter, IDA DPA 2nd loan DOT, IDA DPA 2nd loan Note from the AzIDA portal.

conditions.title: DPA Closing:  IHDA Cash Back

conditions.title: DPA Closing:  IHDA Forgivable 2nd
conditions.description: 4% of purchase price, $6000 max, must use full amount qualified for, 10-yr term, forgiven monthly, no monthly payment, repayment required if sold or refinanced before 10 years.

conditions.description: 10% of purchase price, $10,000 max - must take full amount qualified for 10-yr term, 0 interest, monthly payment is loan amount divided by 120 months.

conditions.title: DPA Closing:  Is Home- Bond 2nd lien
conditions.description: Loan terms, 0 interest, 0 payment and forgiven after 60 months (5yrs). 4% of the total loan amount rounded to the nearest dollar, in the amount of $

conditions.title: DPA Closing:  MERS

conditions.title: DPA Closing:  MHFA Borrower Affidavit

conditions.title: DPA Closing:  MHFA DPL+ 2nd Lien
conditions.description: mortgage and note required from MHFA site, form list. This is a deferred DPA loan up to $18,000 paired only with the 30-yr Start Up 1st lien. 0 rate, 0 payment ,repayable if sold, refinanced or change in occupancy.

conditions.title: DPA Closing:  MHFA FHA Forms
conditions.description: Award Letter and FHA DPA Commitment Letter from the MHFA site form LIst are required to be signed at closing when there is an MHFA DPA 2nd lien.

conditions.title: DPA Closing:  MHFA No cash back

conditions.description: All 8 pages of the PHFA Mortgagor Aff, Form 3, is required to have all fields completed and be included in the Closing Package.

conditions.title: DPA Closing:  PHFA KFit DPA
conditions.description: The 2nd lien DPA loan requires Form 54KFIT Note and Form 55KFIT Mtg. Pull forms from PHFA's site. KFIT is 5% of the lessor of the purchase price or apv, 0 interest, 0 payment, forgiveable loan, forgiven 10% per year over 10 years. The DPA cannot be used towards UFMIP,VA Funding Fee or Guarantee Fee.

conditions.title: DPA Closing:  PHFA required Forms
conditions.description: PHFA Form 28 - Hello Goodbye Letter, Form 4 - Recapture Notice, Form 27- Tax Information Sheet, Form 67, optional, Automatic withdrawal borrower payments.  REMOVE our NQMF Payment Letter from all packages.

conditions.title: DPA:  Maricopa County - Mortgagor Affidavit

conditions.title: DPA:  MHFA Co-borrower

conditions.title: DPA:  MHFA Home Buyer Ed

conditions.title: DPA:  MHFA Max Asset Requirement
conditions.description: all of the 2nd lien programs have a maximum asset requirement. The borrower cannot have more than                   in assets.

conditions.title: DPA:  MHFA Tennessen Warning

conditions.title: DPA:  MHFA, processor to update

conditions.title: DPA:  PHFA Conditional Approval
conditions.description: All conditions listed on the PHFA Approval must be met prior to CTC

Factors are based on score and LTV. IF LTV or score change, update the MI Factors. Check box on top of Form 51 to request MI.

conditions.title: DPA:  PHFA Flood Cert

conditions.title: DPA:  PHFA Form 21

Borrowers with 680 or above, HB education can be completed by 1 borrower online though PHFA acceptable courses or HomeView. Proof of completion is required prior to CTC

Deductible 1% of face value of policy, max $3000. Flood Ins. max ded $5000, DTI max 45%. USDA follow USDA guides.

conditions.title: DPA:  PHFA to Review

conditions.title: DPA:  PHFA Transcripts

conditions.title: DPA:  SC Bond Program NO HPML

conditions.title: DPA:  SC Housing Bond Transcripts
conditions.description: required on all borrowers expected to live and be liabile for the mortgage. Previous 3 years for non-targeted counties or most recent year for targeted counties.  Non-Targeted Counties are: Aiken, Anderson, Charleston, Greenville, Greenwood, Lancaster, Lexington, Oconee, Pickens, Richland, Spartanburg or York

conditions.title: DPA:  SC Housing HB Education

conditions.title: DPA:  SC Housing to review

conditions.title: DPA:  The National Income
conditions.description: Verify income limits per program guidelines. Standard conventional, income cannot exceed 140% of FNMA/FHLMC AMI. Home Ready or Home Possible, income cannot exceed 80% of FNMA/FHLMC AMI.

conditions.title: DPA:  The National MI
conditions.description: Conventional loan, standard MI. Reduced MI - HFA options are not permitted

conditions.title: DPA: FLHTH Homebuyer Education Class - FL Housing
